posts.author: Dhvanit_Merchant17
posts.community: C2C Advanced Systems: Specialized Defence Play
posts.text: Delay of almost 50 days and auditor comes up with Going Concern Uncertainty due to liquidity risk and qualifies the report. The company comes up with a loss and the geographical segment revenue did a complete 360 with domestic revenue of 4 cr sales in H2 vs 66 cr H1 and USA revenue of 76 cr in H2 vs 0 in H1. Looks like the circus finally cracks. Qualified Opinion: image 925×575 148 KB image 676×662 165 KB H2 Results: https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/C2CAS_18072026220851_BM_outcome_financials_V1.pdf Disc: Not Invested.
